name: Building Controls and Services
message: Building Controls and Services, Inc. (BCS) provides innovative building automation, mechanical equipment, and energy management solutions aimed at creating efficient and comfortable environments for facility owners and managers.We are ready to upload 12gb of corporate data. Detailed employee information (DOB, DLs, SSNs, phones, addresses, documents scans and other docs of at least 212 employees), agreements and contracts, confidential files, detailed financials, client information, disclosure agreements, etc.
